privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated FAT32 forensic images populated dynamically with Python scripts from the local system. The setup script generates 'corporate_baseline.dd' (50 files) and 'suspect_seized.dd' (same 50 baseline files plus 15 anomalous files). The expected Autopsy case name ('Exfiltration_Analysis_2026'), required input/output paths (including anomalous_files.csv and elimination_summary.txt), and ground truth tracking logic exactly match the metadata claims.
